channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-11248] sanity_133f test failed: Oops: 0000 [#1] BUG: unable to handle kernel paging request IP: lustre_jobid_clear
item.description:
[ 6963.545649] BUG: unable to handle kernel paging request at 0000000004096000
[ 6963.546299] IP: [<ffffffffa059f918>] lustre_jobid_clear+0x58/0x1c0 [obdclass]
[ 6963.546299] PGD 9ed12067 PUD d3cfe067 PMD 0
[ 6963.546299] Oops: 0000 1 SMP
[ 6963.546299] Modules linked in: lustre(OE) obdecho(OE) mgc(OE) lov(OE) osc(OE) mdc(OE) lmv(OE) fid(OE) fld(OE) ptlrpc(OE) obdclass(OE) ksocklnd(OE) lnet(OE) sha512_generic crypto_null libcfs(OE) rpcsec_gss_krb5 nfsv4 dns_resolver nfs fscache ppdev virtio_balloon pcspkr parport_pc parport i2c_piix4 nfsd auth_rpcgss nfs_acl lockd grace sunrpc ip_tables ext4 mbcache jbd2 ata_generic pata_acpi virtio_blk virtio_net cirrus syscopyarea ata_piix sysfillrect sysimgblt drm_kms_helper serio_raw ttm libata drm virtio_pci virtio_ring i2c_core virtio floppy
[ 6963.546299] CPU: 0 PID: 7675 Comm: badarea_io Tainted: G OE ------------ 3.10.0-327.36.3.el7.x86_64 #1
[ 6963.546299] Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2007
[ 6963.546299] task: ffff880036669700 ti: ffff8800b6034000 task.ti: ffff8800b6034000
[ 6963.546299] RIP: 0010:[<ffffffffa059f918>] [<ffffffffa059f918>] lustre_jobid_clear+0x58/0x1c0 [obdclass]
[ 6963.546299] RSP: 0018:ffff8800b6037e70 EFLAGS: 00010206
[ 6963.546299] RAX: 0000000000000000 RBX: ffff880036614780 RCX: 0000000000000009
[ 6963.546299] RDX: 0000000000000005 RSI: ffffffffa05d54b1 RDI: 0000000004096000
[ 6963.546299] RBP: ffff8800b6037eb0 R08: 0000000004096000 R09: ffff880115be8114

[ 6963.546299] R13: ffff8800b6037f48 R14: 0000000000000005 R15: 0000000000000000
[ 6963.546299] FS: 00007f2edb9ed740(0000) GS:ffff88011fc00000(0000) knlGS:0000000000000000
[ 6963.546299] CS: 0010 DS: 0000 ES: 0000 CR0: 0000000080050033

[ 6963.546299] DR0: 0000000000000000 DR1: 0000000000000000 DR2: 0000000000000000

[ 6963.546299] 00ff880119a6b000 0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0000000000000000
[ 6963.546299] 0000000000000000 0000000048ab6876 0000000000000005 0000000004096000
[ 6963.546299] ffff8800b6037ed0 ffffffffa05302d8 ffff880115be80c0 0000000004096000
[ 6963.546299] Call Trace:
[ 6963.546299] [<ffffffffa05302d8>] obd_proc_jobid_name_seq_write+0x98/0xd0 [obdclass]
[ 6963.546299] [<ffffffff8124938d>] proc_reg_write+0x3d/0x80
[ 6963.546299] [<ffffffff811ded6d>] vfs_write+0xbd/0x1e0
[ 6963.546299] [<ffffffff811ef33d>] ? putname+0x3d/0x60

[ 6963.546299] Code: c0 48 c7 45 cf 00 00 00 00 48 c7 45 d7 00 00 00 00 48 85 db 48 c7 45 df 00 00 00 00 c6 45 e7 00 74 43 48 85 ff 4c 8d 65 c7 74 09 <80> 3f 00 0f 85 bf 00 00 00 f6 05 34 29 e8 ff 40 48 89 df 74 0d

[ 6963.546299] RSP <ffff8800b6037e70>

item.summary: sanity_133f test failed: Oops: 0000 [#1] BUG: unable to handle kernel paging request IP: lustre_jobid_clear

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.
